ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological pathway */,
  "annotation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each annotation of the pathway */,
  "number_of_tfs" INTEGER /* Number of transcription factors (TFs) involved in the pathway */,
  "proportion_significant" REAL /* Proportion of times the pathway is significant (p < 0.05) */,
  "median_rank" INTEGER /* Median rank of the pathway */,
  "disease_state" TEXT /* Disease state associated with the pathway */,
  "therapeutic_target" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pathway is a potential therapeutic target */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pathway was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the pathway information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathways_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "annotation_description" TEXT /* Description or details of the annotation */,
  "study_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the study associated with the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_annotations" (
  "pathway_annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway-annotation relationship */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway */,
  "annotation_id" TEXT /* ID of the annotation */,
  "study_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the study associated with the pathway-annotation relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_annotations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_annotations_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_annotations_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description or details of the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)
